ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "site" TEXT /* Game site (e.g., HOME, AWAY, UCO) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the game (e.g., W 84-79) */,
  "record" TEXT /* Team's record after the game (e.g., 1-1) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee(s) of the game */,
  "official_score" TEXT /* Official score confirmed by the officials */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Current status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "home_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home site for the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team's mascot */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Team's primary color */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Coach's previous coaching experience */,
  "education" TEXT /* Coach's educational background */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any coaching certifications the coach holds */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the coach's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., City, State) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the site in terms of spectators */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the site */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the site */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the site's official website */,
  "parking_info" TEXT /* Information about parking facilities */,
  "public_transport" TEXT /* Nearby public transport options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SF) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the player (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Player's high school */,
  "college" TEXT /* Player's college */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the player's guardian (for minors) */,
  "guardian_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the player's guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls by the player */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Technical fouls by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Player's plus-minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for the season */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won during the season */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Significant awards or recognitions received */,
  "highlight_games" TEXT /* Most memorable games of the season */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance during the season */,
  "season_records" TEXT /* Records set during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password hash */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last user account update */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., Ankle Sprain, Concussion) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the injury */,
  "rehab_progress" TEXT /* Progress of rehabilitation */,
  "rehab_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the rehabilitation process */,
  "injured_part" TEXT /* Part of the body injured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
